signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rate Steady at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rate Steady at 2.5% Amid Rising Inflation Concerns | NO | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board held its benchmark interest rate at 2.5% for the seventh consecutive meeting on April 10, 2026, deciding unanimously to maintain the status quo despite inflationary pressures.[3] South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, exceeding the cent
